subcodes.first_line: Verily the Fire proclaimeth: "There is none other God but Him, the Almighty, the Bestower," and the Light calleth aloud: "He Who was mentioned in the Books hath come." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان النار تنطق انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الوهاب و النور ینادی قد اتی من کان مذکورا فی کتب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
